case_title: ATKINSON-BAKER, INC. VS PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINSON-BAKER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK $532.51 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $598.51, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORIGINAL WRIT RECEIVED-SENT BACK BY PLAINTIFF ATKINSON BAKER FOR A CLERICAL CORRECTION. A NEW WRIT WAS RE-PRINTED AND MAILED TO PLAINTIFF.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $752.42 AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $532.51 FILED BY ATKINSON-BAKER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $53.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $31.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PADRICK, ROBERT DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT PADRICK
